title: Der Untertan
writer: Heinrich Mann, Fritz Staudte, Wolfgang Staudte
actors: Werner Peters, Paul Esser, Renate Fischer
plot: Diederich Heßling is scared of everything and everyone. But as he grows up, he comes to realize that he has to offer his services to the powers-that-be if he wants to wield power himself. His life motto now runs: bow to those at t...
